channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 4 Takeaways From USA's SheBelieves Cup Roster
item.description: Things will start to get interesting for the U.S. women's national team ahead of the SheBelieves Cup.

item.title: Quinnen Williams: Titans Star Jeffery Simmons Might be DPOY Under Robert Saleh
item.description: Cowboys DT Quinnen Williams thinks Titans star Jeffery Simmons could win Defensive Player of the Year honors under Robert Saleh.

item.title: How To Bet This Week in College Hoops: Arizona-Houston, Michigan-Duke, More
item.description: Check out what to know about the best games from this week's men's college basketball slate.

item.title: Tony Clark Reportedly Stepping Down as MLBPA Executive Director
item.description: Tony Clark, the executive director of the MLB Players Association, is reportedly stepping down from his position.

item.title: 2027 Super Bowl Odds: Which Artist Will Headline the Halftime Show?
item.description: Which artist — or artists — will headline the Super Bowl halftime show in 2027 at SoFi Stadium in Inglewood? Here are the early odds.

item.title: The Bilas Index: Ranking the top 68 teams in men's college basketball
item.description: With a month until Selection Sunday, Bilas reveals which teams he has at the top of the pecking order.

item.title: Men's Bracketology: UConn retains its No. 1 seed -- for now
item.description: The Huskies remain on the top line with Houston's loss, but could they be better off as a 2-seed in the East?

item.title: Women's Bracketology: Will Stanford miss the NCAA tournament again?
item.description: Teams with a high NET ranking are typically NCAA tournament locks. So why are the Huskers in the Last Four In?

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United eye shock move for Liverpool's Mac Allister
item.description: Manchester United are considering a shock move for Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister. Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: Why the Lakers' quiet trade deadline could make for an explosive offseason
item.description: With LeBron James' uncertain future, draft assets and significant cap space this summer, the Lakers are set up to be a major offseason player -- and m...
